reference: I had a lower molar removed five weeks ago. The very next morning, I woke up with a slight fever and a sore throat on the side where the tooth was removed. The fever subsided in hours, but since then, I have had weakness in all my extremities, severe back pain, a burning sensation in my mouth, and oral thrush. I also have a rapid heart rate and burning in my sinuses. I have no idea what this could be, and the doctors I have seen are baffled as well.
